title: LIFE SKILLS TRAINING AND MENTORING - 211info
text: HAND IN HAND FARM INC OF OREGON LIFE SKILLS TRAINING AND MENTORING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers family skills training, vocational training, and parenting education through agricultural and equine interactions. Online parenting classes provided. Individuals must wear recommended clothing and shoes to participate in activities. In-person services for family education should involve at least one parent/guardian and their dependent. 35105 Ede Road Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on individuals with autism spectrum disorder. Rebuilding Your Self and Your Family Zoom class is for parents or guardians only. Hours: Varies by service. In-person services must be scheduled in advance. Email (541) 451-1243 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 451-1243 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Visit website to register for a Zoom class or in-person session -Individuals must complete orientation before entering the barn -Call or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: A liability and photographic release prior to engaging in any in-person activities LANGUAGES: English, Spanish and Mandarin Chinese interpretation by arrangement. AREA SERVED: Oregon SITE HOURS: By appointment Services: Parenting Skills Classes Parenting Skills Classes * Autism Spectrum Disorder Youth Employment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HAND IN HAND FARM INC OF OREGON
